answer: Microsoft's annual revenue for 2025 was $281.724 billion. This reflects a significant growth from previous years. This figure is based on the company's financial reports.

results.title: Microsoft Revenue 2012-2025 | MSFT - Macrotrends
results.snippet: * Microsoft annual revenue for 2025 was **$281.724B**, a **14.93% increase** from 2024. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2024 was **$245.122B**, a **15.67% increase** from 2023. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2023 was **$211.915B**, a **6.88% increase** from 2022. | Intuit (INTU) | United States | $97.052B | 20.83 |. | Adobe (ADBE) | United States | $91.086B | 12.68 |. | Synopsys (SNPS) | United States | $75.138B | 41.38 |. | Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) | United States | $73.347B | 48.30 |. | CommVault Systems (CVLT) | United States | $3.908B | 37.98 |. | Blackbaud (BLKB) | United States | $1.574B | 12.02 |. | Progress Software (PRGS) | United States | $1.121B | 5.56 |. | OptimizeRx (OPRX) | United States | $0.115B | 9.15 |. | NetSol Technologies (NTWK) | United States | $0.040B | 21.06 |. | Smith Micro Software (SMSI) | United States | $0.018B | 0.00 |.

results.title: HPCwire - Since 1987 – Covering the Fastest Computers in the World and the People Who Run Them
results.snippet: ## Microsoft Closes Fiscal Year with $281.7B Revenue, Driven by Cloud and AI Growth. has announced the following results for the quarter ended June 30, 2025, as compared to the corresponding period of last fiscal year:. “We closed out the fiscal year with a strong quarter, highlighted by Microsoft Cloud revenue reaching $46.7 billion, up 27% (up 25% in constant currency) year-over-year,” said Amy Hood, executive vice president and chief financial officer of Microsoft. Revenue in Productivity and Business Processes was $33.1 billion and increased 16% (up 14% in constant currency), with the following business highlights:. Revenue in Intelligent Cloud was $29.9 billion and increased 26% (up 25% in constant currency), with the following business highlights:. Revenue in More Personal Computing was $13.5 billion and increased 9%, with the following business highlights:. Microsoft (Nasdaq “MSFT”) creates platforms and tools powered by AI to deliver innovative solutions that meet the evolving needs of our customers. ### Boehringer Ingelheim Adds London AI Center to Global Computational Innovation Network.

results.title: Microsoft Corporation Revenue 2016-2025
results.snippet: Microsoft Corporation's quarterly revenue was **$65.59 B**(Q1: Sep 2024), **$69.63 B**(Q2: Dec 2024), **$70.07 B**(Q3: Mar 2025), **$76.44 B**(Q4: Jun 2025) in fiscal year 2025. Microsoft Corporation's quarterly revenue was **$56.52 B**(Q1: Sep 2023), **$62.02 B**(Q2: Dec 2023), **$61.86 B**(Q3: Mar 2024), **$64.73 B**(Q4: Jun 2024) in fiscal year 2024. Microsoft Corporation's quarterly revenue was **$50.12 B**(Q1: Sep 2022), **$52.75 B**(Q2: Dec 2022), **$52.86 B**(Q3: Mar 2023), **$56.19 B**(Q4: Jun 2023) in fiscal year 2023. Microsoft Corporation's quarterly revenue was **$45.32 B**(Q1: Sep 2021), **$51.73 B**(Q2: Dec 2021), **$49.36 B**(Q3: Mar 2022), **$51.87 B**(Q4: Jun 2022) in fiscal year 2022. Microsoft Corporation's quarterly revenue was **$37.15 B**(Q1: Sep 2020), **$43.08 B**(Q2: Dec 2020), **$41.71 B**(Q3: Mar 2021), **$46.15 B**(Q4: Jun 2021) in fiscal year 2021. Microsoft Corporation's quarterly revenue was **$33.06 B**(Q1: Sep 2019), **$36.91 B**(Q2: Dec 2019), **$35.02 B**(Q3: Mar 2020), **$38.03 B**(Q4: Jun 2020) in fiscal year 2020.

results.title: Microsoft FY2025 Revenue: Cloud and Productivity Dominate | GraniteShares ETFs posted on the topic | LinkedIn
results.snippet: $12.8B) - Microsoft Cloud Revenue: $49.1B (+26% YoY) - Intelligent Cloud: $30.9B (+28% YoY) - Azure and other cloud services: +40% YoY - Productivity & Business Processes Revenue: $33.0B (+17% YoY) - Microsoft 365 Commercial Cloud: +17% YoY - Microsoft 365 Consumer Cloud: +26% YoY - LinkedIn Revenue: +10% YoY - Dynamics 365 Revenue: +18% YoY - Windows OEM & Devices: +6% YoY - Xbox Content & Services: +1% YoY - Search & News Ads ex-TAC: +16% YoY Commentary: CEO Satya Nadella: “Our global-scale cloud and AI platform, together with Copilots in high-value areas, drives broad adoption and tangible impact.” CFO Amy Hood: “A strong start to the fiscal year… the success of Microsoft Cloud reflects growing customer demand for our differentiated platform.” #MSFT #Earnings #Report #TechnologyServices #PackagedSoftware
